title: agrostis alba subsp. stolonizans
intro: Agrostis alba subsp. stolonizans, also known as creeping bentgrass, is a perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Agrostis alba subsp. stolonizans include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve infusions, decoctions, or topical applications, which can be made by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water or mixing them with other herbs to create a paste for external use.
